title: cotoneaster nummularius subvar. tomentellus
intro: Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. tomentellus is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its dense, greyish-brown foliage and small, white flowers. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Cotoneaster nummularius subvar. tomentellus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
